panels.title: Cost USD per day (reviewer)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, model_id AS metric, SUM(COALESCE(cost_usd, 0)) AS value FROM setup_reviews WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Reviewer agent daily spend by model_id. cost_usd is computed at dispatch from review_price_input/output/cache_read settings × usage_tokens.

panels.title: Cost USD per day (post-mortem)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, model_id AS metric, SUM(COALESCE(cost_usd, 0)) AS value FROM setup_post_mortems WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Post-mortem agent daily spend by model_id. Triggered when a setup closes (one run per trade close at most).

panels.title: Tokens per turn (p50/p95)

targets.rawSql: WITH t AS (SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS bucket, ((usage_tokens->>'input_tokens')::int + (usage_tokens->>'output_tokens')::int) AS total_tokens FROM setup_reviews WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND usage_tokens IS NOT NULL) SELECT bucket AS time, 'reviewer p50' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY total_tokens) AS value FROM t GROUP BY bucket UNION ALL SELECT bucket AS time, 'reviewer p95' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY total_tokens) AS value FROM t GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Tokens per agent run (input+output, no cache breakdown). High p95 vs p50 suggests blow-out queries dominated by long retrieved-context tools (journal_query, similar_setups).

panels.title: Aggregate cost (7d) by source

targets.rawSql: SELECT NOW() AS time, 'reviewer' AS metric, SUM(COALESCE(cost_usd,0)) AS value FROM setup_reviews WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' UNION ALL SELECT NOW() AS time, 'post_mortem' AS metric, SUM(COALESCE(cost_usd,0)) AS value FROM setup_post_mortems WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'

panels.description: 7-day spend by agent source. The main chat agent's cost is added once PR-11 lands llm_usage_log; until then this panel covers reviewer + post_mortem only.

panels.title: Avg cost per setup (closed setups)

targets.rawSql: WITH per_setup AS (SELECT trade_id, SUM(cost_usd) AS total FROM (SELECT trade_id, cost_usd FROM setup_reviews UNION ALL SELECT trade_id, cost_usd FROM setup_post_mortems) u WHERE cost_usd IS NOT NULL GROUP BY trade_id) SELECT NOW() AS time, AVG(total) AS value FROM per_setup

panels.description: Average accumulated cost across all review + post-mortem runs per closed setup. Target stays under ~$0.05 with the F4 review tuning.
